findings.title: numQuestions default 5 applied uniformly across all grade bands
findings.fix: Resolve band-aware default at dispatcher: primary=8, middle=12, secondary=20, senior=25

findings.title: Single 5E pedagogy template applied to all bands; spec wants band-specific frameworks
findings.evidence: You MUST organize the activities into the 5E Instructional Model — applied unconditionally
findings.fix: Derive gradeBand and conditionally swap pedagogy block in Handlebars prompt

findings.title: Quiz prompt has no vocabulary-age constraint; LLM free to use Class-9 vocabulary for Class 3
findings.fix: Add gradeBand-conditional vocabulary register block (e.g., 'sentences ≤8 words, Dolch-2' for primary)

findings.title: Parent message tone fixed; no child-age modulation
findings.evidence: Single 'empathetic, respectful, solution-focused' instruction; no band branching
findings.fix: Add gradeBand to ParentMessageInputSchema and 4 tone blocks (primary=warm/concrete, secondary=board-year, senior=college-prep)

findings.title: No board-exam awareness (CBSE Class 10) or NEET/JEE awareness (Class 11-12 Science)
findings.fix: Inject board-format block for secondary + competitive-exam block for senior Science

findings.title: Primary lesson plan lacks 'avoid abstract concepts' guard; concrete-operational stage not encoded
findings.fix: Conditional block: 'For Class 1-5: use only concrete examples; no metaphors, no symbolic abstraction'

findings.title: Silent 'Class 5' fallback masks band misconfiguration
findings.fix: Throw or log error instead of silently defaulting to primary band

live_probe_status: static-only; harness at qa/forensics/repros/F18/probe.mjs requires ID_TOKEN env var
p0_predicted_runtime: F18-02 + F18-06 will manifest as senior-secondary-style derivations in primary lesson plans when grade is mislabeled or when LLM defaults override; reproducible via live probe
